requirements.text: decide() must not hang longer than DECISION_TIMEOUT_MS (120s default)
requirements.acceptance: Mock complete() to never resolve; call decide() with timeoutMs=50; verify it rejects with a 'timed out' error; suite completes in <1s with no hangs

requirements.text: decide() must pass signal: AbortSignal to both complete() and completeSimple()
requirements.acceptance: Mock complete() and completeSimple() to capture their options arg; verify opts.signal is an AbortSignal instance; verify opts.signal.aborted is false at call time

requirements.text: On timeout, decide() must throw an Error whose message contains 'timed out'
requirements.acceptance: Call decide() with a never-resolving mock; catch the error; verify err.message includes 'timed out'; verify err is an instance of Error

requirements.text: On normal completion, the timeout timer must be cleared (no leaked timers)
requirements.acceptance: Call decide() with a fast-resolving mock; after completion, verify no timer is pending (bun test process exits cleanly — no hanging timers)

requirements.text: DECISION_TIMEOUT_MS must be exported as a named constant
Existing tests must continue to pass (no regression)
requirements.acceptance: bun test test/ exits 0; all 48+ existing tests pass unchanged

requirements.text: The timeout error must be caught by existing caller error handlers
requirements.acceptance: Verify via code path analysis that runSelection and handleTurnEnd catch the timeout error and set state.mode = 'idle'. The existing try/catch blocks at index.ts:436-446 and index.ts:599-610 handle all errors from decide().

requirements.text: completeSimple() fallback path must also use the same timeout signal
requirements.acceptance: When complete() throws (non-timeout) and completeSimple() is called as fallback, it must receive the same signal. Mock complete() to throw immediately, mock completeSimple() to capture opts, verify opts.signal is an AbortSignal.

success_criteria: decide() rejects with a timeout error within 100ms of the timeout when complete() never resolves
decide() passes signal: AbortSignal to complete() and completeSimple()
On timeout, decide() throws Error with 'timed out' in message
Timeout during completeSimple() fallback also rejects with 'timed out'
All existing tests pass (no regression) — bun test test/ exits 0
